description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a slender, elongated body and limbs. The figure appears to be in a dynamic walking pose, with one arm extended forward and the other back, suggesting movement. The head is small and proportionate to the body, and the overall silhouette is streamlined. The clothing is form-fitting, with no visible accessories or carried items. The surface is smooth and reflective, giving the figure a sleek, almost metallic appearance. The asset is minimalistic, with no facial features or intricate garment details.
description: A slender, elongated adult pedestrian in a dynamic walking pose with smooth, reflective surfaces and minimalistic features.
description_view_0: Only a small portion of the figure's upper body and head is visible, showing a smooth, dark surface.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the body and limbs, emphasizing the elongated, streamlined form and walking posture.
description_view_2: This angle shows the figure's back and the extended arm, highlighting the dynamic stride and slender build.
description_view_3: A close-up of the lower body, focusing on the legs and the smooth, reflective surface.
